title: Kenya Seismic Design Parameters for Bridges

seismic_zones.description: Kenya seismic zones per Figure 3.30 (Source: WHO 2010)

zones.typical_regions: Eastern Kenya (Garissa, Mombasa coastal areas, parts of northeastern Kenya)
Central Kenya (Nairobi, Thika, parts of central highlands, Nakuru)
Western Kenya Rift Valley (Kisumu, Eldoret, Kitale, Kakamega, Lake Victoria region)

notes: Seismic zones and PGA values are indicative, based on WHO seismic map.
Actual values for bridge-specific site should be obtained from Mines and Geological Department, Kenya.
Return period T_NCR = 475 years recommended (Eurocode default). UK National Annex uses T_NCR = 2500 years.

categories.description: Bridges not critical for maintaining communication and of less than average importance
General road bridges of average importance

Bridges of critical importance for maintaining communications, especially post-earthquake; bridges with large number of probable fatalities; major bridges where design life greater than normal is required

importance_factors.notes: Where T_NCR = 2500 years is adopted for Category III, gamma_I = 1.0 may be assumed.

types.description: Rock or other rock-like geological formation, including at most 5 m of weaker material at surface
Deposits of very dense sand, gravel, or very stiff clay, at least several tens of metres thick, characterised by gradual increase of mechanical properties with depth
Deep deposits of dense or medium-dense sand, gravel or stiff clay with thickness from several tens to many hundreds of metres
Deposits of loose-to-medium cohesionless soil, or of predominantly soft-to-firm cohesive soil
Surface alluvium layer with v_s of Type C or D (5-20m thick), underlain by stiffer material with v_s > 800 m/s
Deposits containing a layer of soft clay/silt (PI > 40) at least 10m thick, with high water content
Deposits of liquefiable soils, sensitive clays, or any other soil profile not in A-E or S1

elastic_response_spectra.description: Parameters for elastic response spectra per Table 3.26

equations.eta: sqrt(10/(5+xi)) >= 0.55, where xi = damping ratio in %

vertical_elastic_response_spectra.description: Parameters for vertical elastic response spectra per Table 3.27

behaviour_factors.description: Maximum values of behaviour factor q per Table 3.28

factors.member_type: Reinforced concrete piers -- vertical in bending
Reinforced concrete piers -- inclined struts in bending
Steel piers -- inclined struts in bending

behaviour_factors.lambda_definition: lambda = 1.0 for alpha_s >= 3; lambda = sqrt(alpha_s/3) for 3 > alpha_s >= 1.0; alpha_s = L_s/h is shear span ratio

low_seismicity_thresholds.description: Thresholds for reduced or simplified seismic design

low_seismicity.T_NCR_475: a_g on Type A ground <= 0.78 m/s2
low_seismicity.T_NCR_2500: a_g on Type A ground <= 2 m/s2
low_seismicity.action: Reduced or simplified seismic design procedures may be used

very_low_seismicity.T_NCR_475: a_g on Type A ground <= 0.39 m/s2
very_low_seismicity.T_NCR_2500: a_g on Type A ground <= 1.8 m/s2
very_low_seismicity.action: Seismic action effects may be neglected
